actions.name: Crafty Shield

cost.trigger: The user is targeted by a Status-Category attack.

actions.description:
Trigger: The user is targeted by a Status-Category attack.

Effect: The triggering attack fails to hit, and additional Status-Category attacks targeting the user also fail to hit until the end of the user's next Activation. Attacks failing to hit do not activate on-miss effects.

On resolution, the user gains @Affliction[disabled] 3 on this Attack.
